title: Jebert
compiled_truth: Jebert is an external contact at [Eadslink](companies/eadslink). Over the corpus period (2000-11-06 to 2002-01-18), Jebert sent 13 and received 13 emails, totalling 26 interactions. Top correspondents: [Don Baughman](people/don-baughman) (13), [Tichavsky' 'Scott](people/tichavsky-scott) (6), [Nobles David](people/nobles-david) (4), [Snapka Gerald](people/snapka-gerald) (3), [Strawn Scott](people/strawn-scott) (3).
